subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant who is related to him whose breast Thou didst expand with the light of Thy knowledge, and whose countenance Thou didst illumine with radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک المنتسب الی من شرحت صدره بنور معرفتک و نورت وجهه بضیاء
